title: Designing a Tech-Savvy Customer Avatar
scenario: Create a detailed persona description (text) for a tech company targeting early adopters who prefer online shopping. The persona should include demographics, pain points, goals, behaviors, and preferred communication channels. The description should be concise and under 150 words.
constraints: Must include the persona's name, age range, and occupation
Must mention at least three pain points related to online shopping

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Does the prompt ensure a thorough and detailed persona description?
Does the prompt maintain a professional and objective tone?
